testcase.name: SC20-T05 · computeFinalGradeSource (spec §6.3 A.2 三态) > aiJudge === null → self
SC20-T05 · computeFinalGradeSource (spec §6.3 A.2 三态) > aiJudge.status !== DONE → self
SC20-T05 · computeFinalGradeSource (spec §6.3 A.2 三态) > verdict === grade → ai_accepted
SC20-T05 · computeFinalGradeSource (spec §6.3 A.2 三态) > verdict !== grade → ai_overridden (含中间值 PARTIAL · spec TC-21.03)
SC20-T05 · deriveAiJudgeBannerViewModel (AC1 主区 + fallback 退化) > DONE + verdict 非 null → showMain=true · 主区渲染
SC20-T05 · deriveAiJudgeBannerViewModel (AC1 主区 + fallback 退化) > TIMEOUT → showFallback=true · 退化态
SC20-T05 · deriveAiJudgeBannerViewModel (AC1 主区 + fallback 退化) > LOW_CONFIDENCE → showFallback=true + fallbackKey lowConfidence
SC20-T05 · deriveAiJudgeBannerViewModel (AC1 主区 + fallback 退化) > SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE → showFallback=true + fallbackKey banner.fallback
SC20-T05 · deriveAiJudgeBannerViewModel (AC1 主区 + fallback 退化) > IDLE / PENDING → 都不显示 (showMain=false, showFallback=false · banner skeleton 由 page wxml 单独处理)
SC20-T05 · deriveAiJudgeBannerViewModel (AC1 主区 + fallback 退化) > confidence NaN / Infinity → 0
SC20-T05 · shouldShowAiFlag + deriveAiMetaChip + deriveAiHintRibbon (AC2) > shouldShowAiFlag · 仅 DONE 显示
SC20-T05 · shouldShowAiFlag + deriveAiMetaChip + deriveAiHintRibbon (AC2) > deriveAiMetaChip · 仅 DONE 显示 · pct 整数
SC20-T05 · shouldShowAiFlag + deriveAiMetaChip + deriveAiHintRibbon (AC2) > deriveAiHintRibbon · 仅 DONE + verdict 非 null 显示
SC20-T05 · deriveGradeButtonsViewModel (AC3 preselected ring + aria-label) > preselected === PARTIAL · 只 partial 按钮带 preselected cls + showMark + aria-label 含 "AI 建议"
SC20-T05 · deriveGradeButtonsViewModel (AC3 preselected ring + aria-label) > preselected === null → 无 ring · 无 mark · aria-label 不含 AI 建议
SC20-T05 · deriveGradeButtonsViewModel (AC3 preselected ring + aria-label) > revealed=false → 全 disabled + 含 rbtn-disabled class
SC20-T05 · deriveGradeButtonsViewModel (AC3 preselected ring + aria-label) > isGrading=true → 全 disabled
SC20-T05 · deriveGradeButtonsViewModel (AC3 preselected ring + aria-label) > color-blind safety (TI2): aria-label 不仅靠颜色 · "AI 建议" 字面必出
SC20-T05 · i18n locale 14 + 1 模板 key 完整 (AC5) > zh.json 覆盖全部 SC20_T05_REQUIRED_KEYS
SC20-T05 · i18n locale 14 + 1 模板 key 完整 (AC5) > en.json 覆盖全部 SC20_T05_REQUIRED_KEYS · 双语必齐
SC20-T05 · i18n locale 14 + 1 模板 key 完整 (AC5) > SC20_T05_REQUIRED_KEYS = 15 项 (14 spec §14 + 1 模板)
SC20-T05 · i18n locale 14 + 1 模板 key 完整 (AC5) > translate · 模板插值 + missing fallback
SC20-T05 · TI1 reverse · tap CTA = tap 对应按钮 (body 字面 diff = 0) > aiVerdict=PARTIAL · tap accept CTA 等价 tap PARTIAL 按钮 → 都算 ai_accepted
SC20-T05 · TI1 reverse · tap CTA = tap 对应按钮 (body 字面 diff = 0) > aiVerdict=MASTERED · tap accept CTA = tap MASTERED 按钮 → ai_accepted
